ogTitle: Kangaroo Point vs Kanigan: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kangaroo Point and Kanigan.
heading: Kangaroo Point vs Kanigan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kangaroo Point, Queensland and Kanigan, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kangaroo Point has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Kanigan (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kangaroo Point or Kanigan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kangaroo Point has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Kanigan scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kangaroo Point scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Kanigan scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kangaroo Point or Kanigan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kangaroo Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
